title: Smoky Roasted Mediterranean Avocado Crumble
description: A fresh and flaky mediterranean dish featuring roasted vegetables with a touch of smokiness, fermented elements for tanginess, and a paleo-friendly crumble topping.
instructions: Toss cherry tomatoes, bell pepper, zucchini, and parsley with lemon juice and garlic in a large bowl.
Spread the vegetables evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast for about 15 minutes or until veggies are tender and slightly caramelized.
Scoop avocado flesh into a blender or food processor. Add roasted vegetables, 2 tablespoons of water (for easier blending), salt, black pepper, and optional smoked paprika to taste.
Blend until smooth but still chunky for texture. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
Warm the crumble topping in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Stir in melted butter, if using. Serve warm or at room temperature with roasted veggies on top.
